name: EdwClmLnHlthCstGrpLoadRunCycUpd

text.value: WITH cte_filter AS (SELECT T.SRC_SYS_CD, T.TRGT_SYS_CD, T.SUBJ_CD, MIN(T.RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T WHERE T.TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND T.SUBJ_CD = 'CLM_LN_HLTH_CST' AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND T.RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY T.SRC_SYS_CD, T.TRGT_SYS_CD, T.SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T INNER JOIN cte_filter CF ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = CF.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = CF.SUBJ_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = CF.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.RUN_CYC_NO >= CF.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N';

Description:
JOB NAME:    EdwIndvBeMaraLoadRunCycUpd


DESCRIPTION:    Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.
      

INPUTS:	IDS - CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP
               

HASH FILES:  none


TRANSFORMS:  none


PROCESSING:  Each IDS Claim source has a seperate SQL to extract the maximum run cycle value.  These run cycle values are used to update the IDS P_RUN_CYCLE, load indicator field for the particular source and subject.  All run cycles less than the maximum where the indicator is "N" are updated to "Y".
  

OUTPUTS:    IDS    - P_RUN_CYC
                  


MODIFICATIONS:
Date                 Developer                Change Description                                                                              Development Project    Code Reviewer            Date Reviewed
------------------      ----------------------------     --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------    -----------------------------------   -------------------------          ----------------------------
2015-04-22      Raja Gummadi          Original Programming                                                                            EnterpriseNewDevl        Kalyan Neelam            2015-04-23

Annotations:
Get list of source systems and the maximum run cycles for the source system from the IDS table.
Job Name: EdwMbrRiskLoadRunCycUpd_EE
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
